name: /standards-monitor fetcher failure on one source does not abort iteration over the remaining sources
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [{id: a}, {id: b}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-monitor.sh" --watch --once --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --fetcher-stub fail-a-pass-b 2>out.txt && grep -q 'a status=fail' out.txt && grep -q 'b status=ok' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
